rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"@kody decompose can introduce lint errors into the codebase — always run lint/verify after a decompose run to catch issues before merge.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Conditional useCallback calls inside early returns violate React hooks rules and must be restructured so hooks are called unconditionally at the top level.","scope":"React hooks"},{"kind":"convention","text":"When fix-lint runs on a stage with known lint failures, fix those errors in the same stage rather than surfacing them for a later pass.","scope":"pipeline"}]}
